lesson.menu_desc: Ask for and give directions: bus, station, map, corner, street, left, right, straight -- imperatives + prepositions of place -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 8 -- Going Places: Directions and Transport
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Érica Maria Machado Santarem | Aula 8 -- Going Places: Directions and Transport

listenings.text: Hello, my name is Renata. Let me tell you how I go to work. Every morning I take the bus near my house. The bus stop is on the corner of my street. I look at the map on my phone. The bus goes straight for ten minutes. Then I get off at the big station. My office is next to the station, on the right. I walk for two minutes and I am at work. It is an easy way, and I am never late.

Hi, I am Felipe. A friend wants to visit my home, so I give him directions. First, take the bus number twelve. Get off at the central station. Then go straight on Green Street for two blocks. Turn left at the corner, next to the small market. My building is on the right, in front of a blue cafe. It is not difficult. Call me if you are lost, and I will wait for you near the door.

extra_audio.text: First, take the bus near your house. Second, get off at the big station. Third, go straight on the main street. Fourth, turn left at the corner. Fifth, the office is on the right, next to the bank.
